title: Transparency and reproducibility package for: Beyond-AHI hypoxic metrics and hard cardiovascular and mortality outcomes in adult OSA-related cohorts
description: Repository-ready transparency package containing the final executed search appendix, screening and full-text review logs, extraction and synthesis tables, risk-of-bias source file, final export script, and final upload-ready figure files supporting the OSA beyond-AHI hypoxic-metrics systematic review and meta-analysis. This metadata snapshot corresponds to the public companion repository archived at Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19228372.

notes: Local metadata snapshot synchronized on 2026-03-26. The repository package uses CC BY 4.0. If a future GitHub release is archived to Zenodo, update this metadata deliberately rather than leaving placeholder text.
